parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: "gpt-4o-mini", messages: [{ role: "user", content: $json.prompt }], response_format: { type: "json_object" }, temperature: 0.3 }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ $json._error === true ? JSON.stringify({ error: $json.detail || "Workflow error", step: $json.step || "unknown" }) : JSON.stringify({ clients: $json.clients, template: $json.template }) }}
